problems.title: Every worry has a quiet place to land.
problems.subhead: From the first growth check to the 3am scare, ChildBloom meets the moments that actually keep you up — each one met with calm, evidence-based guidance built for Indian families.

sources.nfhs: National Family Health Survey (NFHS-5), 2019–21, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India.
sources.clinic: Indian clinical studies on early-childhood developmental screening.
sources.who: World Health Organization — maternal mental health.

c1.solution: Plots weight, height and head against WHO percentiles in plain language — and flags it early if the curve dips.
c1.stat: 36% of under-5s in India are stunted.

c2.problem: How is my child doing overall?
c2.solution: A two-minute weekly check-in becomes one clear, AI-written insight — your whole week, understood at a glance.

c1.problem: What do I feed, and when?
c1.solution: An Indian food tracker with stage-by-stage first-food guidance — so every meal fits your child's age.
c1.stat: Low dietary diversity is a leading driver of child malnutrition.

c2.solution: Age-appropriate meal ideas tuned to what your child already eats — gentle nudges, never pressure.

c1.problem: The baby won't sleep, there's no routine.
c1.solution: Predicts the next nap from your child's wake windows — so you catch the sleepy window instead of missing it.

c2.problem: Logging every little thing is exhausting.
c2.solution: Speak it or tap it in seconds, then wake up to a calm Daily Bloom Brief that sums up the day for you.

c1.solution: Tracks milestones by age with gentle red-flag prompts — so nothing important slips by unnoticed.
c1.stat: 37% of developmental delays in India are caught only at age 3 or later.

c2.problem: Is this normal, or should I worry?
c2.solution: Evidence-based answers to everyday questions — calm facts instead of WhatsApp rumours.

c1.problem: There's an emergency and I freeze.
c1.solution: Step-by-step, read-aloud first aid that works without signal — CPR, choking and burns, guided in the moment.

c2.problem: Vaccines and records are total chaos.
c2.solution: An IAP-schedule tracker, health records and a doctor-ready PDF — your child's whole history, one tap away.
c2.stat: Only 76.4% of Indian children aged 12–23 months are fully vaccinated.

c1.problem: I feel overwhelmed and alone at 3am.
c1.solution: Warm, judgment-free support whenever you need it, plus a gentle wellbeing check-in that looks after you too.
c1.stat: 1 in 5 Indian mothers experience postpartum depression.
